broadcasttransactions: Description (User's Normal Transaction): Stores detailed records of broadcast transactions, including transfers between users, wallets, external apps, fees, and transaction steps.
(broadcasttransactions) _id (ObjectId): Unique identifier for the transaction record.
(broadcasttransactions) txId (String, required): Unique transaction identifier for blockchain or internal tracking.
(broadcasttransactions) currencyId (ObjectId, required): References the token/currency used in the transaction.
(broadcasttransactions) fromUserId (ObjectId, required): User who initiated the transaction.
(broadcasttransactions) fromWalletId (ObjectId): Wallet from which the amount was sent.
(broadcasttransactions) toWalletId (ObjectId): Wallet that receives the amount.
(broadcasttransactions) externalAppId (ObjectId): References any external application involved in the transaction.
(broadcasttransactions) referenceId (String, default=null): Optional reference ID for external systems.
(broadcasttransactions) from (String, required): Address or identifier of the sender.
(broadcasttransactions) contractAddress (String, default=null): Contract address if the transaction is on a smart contract.
(broadcasttransactions) toUserId (ObjectId, required): Recipient user ID.
(broadcasttransactions) to (String, required): Address or identifier of the recipient.
(broadcasttransactions) amount (String, required): Amount sent in the transaction (as string to support big numbers).
(broadcasttransactions) memo (String, default=null): Optional memo or note attached to the transaction.
(broadcasttransactions) remark (String, required): Remark or description of the transaction purpose.
(broadcasttransactions) status (String, required): Current status of the transaction. Possible values:
'Pending' = Transaction initiated but not completed
'Completed' = Transaction successfully completed
'Failed' = Transaction failed
(broadcasttransactions) fees (Number): Fees charged for this transaction.
(broadcasttransactions) usdPrice (Number): USD price of the asset at transaction time.
(broadcasttransactions) tatumAsset (String): Tatum blockchain asset code, if applicable.
(broadcasttransactions) transactionType (Number): Type of transaction:
1 = Withdraw (funds sent out)
2 = Deposit (funds received)
(broadcasttransactions) usdAmount (Number, default=0): Equivalent USD value of the transaction.
(broadcasttransactions) flightBookingId (ObjectId): References a flight booking if transaction is related to flight purchase.
(broadcasttransactions) hotelBookingId (ObjectId): References a hotel booking if transaction is related to hotel purchase.
(broadcasttransactions) cardRequestId (ObjectId): References a card request related to the transaction.
(broadcasttransactions) cardId (String): Card identifier, if applicable.
(broadcasttransactions) isFlightBooked (Number, default=0): Indicates if flight booking was successful (0=no, 1=yes).
(broadcasttransactions) isHotelBooked (Number, default=0): Indicates if hotel booking was successful (0=no, 1=yes).
(broadcasttransactions) uuid (String): Unique identifier used internally or for tracking purposes.
(broadcasttransactions) isAutoLessFees (Number): Flag for automatic fee deduction.
(broadcasttransactions) transactionSteps (Array): Tracks step-by-step progress of the transaction. Each step includes:
title (String): Step title or name
date (Date): Timestamp of the step
status (Number): Step status: 1=pending, 2=done, 3=failed
label (String): Optional label for the step
description (String): Optional description for the step
(broadcasttransactions) createdAt (Date, auto-generated): Timestamp when transaction was created.
(broadcasttransactions) updatedAt (Date, auto-generated): Timestamp when transaction was last updated.
